title: FDC3 Intent Interoperability on C3
description: State 014 layers FDC3 context and intent interoperability onto the C3 TraderX runtime and adds a local Sail sidecar demo environment.

nodes.label: Trader
nodes.description: User interacting with TraderX blotters and tickets.

nodes.label: TraderX Angular UI
nodes.description: Trade/order/position views plus FDC3 integration adapter.

nodes.label: TraderX Ingress
nodes.description: NGINX ingress for TraderX UI/API traffic.

nodes.label: Sail Sidecar
nodes.description: Local Sail desktop-agent runtime hosted outside TraderX ingress.

nodes.label: Sail App Directory Profile
nodes.description: Seeded app-directory records for TraderX and demo apps.

nodes.label: Demo FDC3 Apps
nodes.description: Chart/quote/workbench apps participating in ticker workflows.

nodes.label: Order Matcher API
nodes.description: Order listing and lifecycle endpoints used by order flows.

nodes.label: Trade Service API
nodes.description: Trade creation/query endpoints used by trade ticket flows.

nodes.label: Position Service API
nodes.description: Position/blotter data source for symbol-selected rows.

nodes.label: NATS Broker
nodes.description: Realtime ticker and lifecycle updates via websocket gateway.

edges.label: Selects blotter rows and launches tickets
Order ticket and order blotter workflows
Receives realtime pricing/order updates via nats-ws

notes: FDC3 integration is additive and frontend-scoped.
No backend API or schema changes are required for core interoperability behavior.
Sail sidecar is intentionally outside TraderX ingress to keep concerns separated.
Degraded mode preserves baseline workflows when DesktopAgent is unavailable.
